summary:
WEEKLY REVIEW — 3 projects

ISSUES FOUND
- None confirmed. No bugs filed.
- crypto-trading: log read returned not_configured (TRADING_DB_PATH unset) — monitoring is blind, but this is a setup gap, not a confirmed failure, so no issue filed.
- volleyball: results read returned not_configured (VOLLEYBALL_RESULTS_PATH unset) — same situation, no issue filed.
- ufc-dashboard: HEALTHY — 50/50 runs succeeded this week (100%), no last error, data fresh.

ENHANCEMENT IDEAS (ranked by effort/impact)
1. [crypto-trading #15] Add TRADING_DB_PATH config + healthcheck.py — LOW effort / HIGH impact. Document the env var in .env.example and add a script asserting the SQLite DB exists and has a recent fill, so silent failures (CCXT auth expiry, zero fills) don't go unnoticed for a week. Unblocks all future reviews.
2. [volleyball #1] Emit structured results.json at VOLLEYBALL_RESULTS_PATH — LOW effort / HIGH impact. Serialize already-computed metrics (ball-detection rate, failed/dropped frames, frames processed, model version) per run to enable regression tracking.
3. [ufc-dashboard #9] Snapshot odds per run + compute opening-vs-current deltas — LOW effort / MEDIUM impact. Persist timestamped odds rows instead of overwriting, then derive line-movement deltas to flag steam moves. Purely additive; project is otherwise healthy.

Note: two of three read tools are not_configured, so the top priority this week is wiring up logging/metrics paths (#15, #1) so future reviews have real data to inspect.
